channel.title: AI·Brief — Daily Tech Intelligence
channel.description: Automated AI-powered tech news briefings updated every 3 hours.

item.title: Assassin's Creed Co-Creator Re-Reveals 1666 Amsterdam, 30-Minute Demo Playable Now
item.description: 1666 Amsterdam, a historical action adventure, is back with a 30-minute demo at Summer Game Fest, revealed by co-creator Patrice Désilets.

item.title: RuneScape: Dragonwilds Leaves Early Access and Launches Across PC, PS5, and Xbox Series X and S in September
item.description: RuneScape: Dragonwilds officially launches on September 15, 2026, across PC, PS5, and Xbox Series X and S, adding to a busy gaming month.

item.title: Control Resonant Preview - Hands-On With Remedy’s Surreal Take On Stylish Action
item.description: Control Resonant offers a fresh melee-focused action experience, diverging from its predecessor's shooter mechanics, as previewed by Game Informer.

item.title: Nintendo Switch 2: One Year Later
item.description: Celebrating one year since its release, the Nintendo Switch 2 features enhanced hardware, a larger screen, and new Joy-Con controllers, improving the gaming experience.

item.title: Leak Reveals Microsoft Wants Its AI To Be ‘Addictive,’ CEO Satya Nadella Feigns Astonishment
item.description: Microsoft's new AI assistant, Scout, reportedly aims for addictiveness, as revealed in a leaked internal document, surprising even CEO Satya Nadella.

item.title: Elden Ring Tarnished Edition launches August 28
item.description: Elden Ring's Tarnished Edition is set to launch for Switch 2 on August 28, alongside new downloadable content, enhancing the game's offerings.
